doc: A self-playing saw arpeggio through the DJ-mixer `djfilter` knob (ADR-0032). The Clock's beat gate drives a sequencer (a major arpeggio) into a 4-voice Voicer; each of the 4 voices is a hosted `djfilter-demo-voice` sub-patch (saw -> plucky ADSR VCA). The voicer sums them and the star — one bipolar filter knob — sweeps the master djfilter. The knob `/filterpos` is an `m2s` (the value->signal converter; rests at North = 0, smoothed so turning it is zipper-free) wired straight into the master djfilter's Signal `position`. Send /filterpos/in [-1..1]: 0 = open/no filter, negative (CCW) sweeps a low-pass down, positive (CW) sweeps a high-pass up. Set tempo via /clock/tempo; edit the line via /sequencer/step1../sequencer/step8.

nodes.doc: Walks a major arpeggio one step per beat -> degree Messages.
Hosts 4 djfilter-demo-voice sub-patches; resolves each degree to Hz and allocates it across the voices, summing their audio.
The master DJ filter on the summed mix. position is driven by the smoothed knob; resonance set to sing on sweeps.
